title: HSI Curve
description: Habitat Suitability Index curve. SPEC v0.5 §4.2.2 + §3.1.3. Enforces Bovee 1986 Category and transferability rigor.

species.description: Latin name lowercase with underscores, e.g. oncorhynchus_mykiss

points.description: Piecewise-linear points; x must be monotonically non-decreasing

category.description: Bovee 1986: I=expert opinion, II=utilization, III=preference observation. Mandatory.

geographic_origin.description: Basin code or country, e.g. 'Yellowstone-River-USA' or 'Yangtze-CN'. Use 'unknown' only for legacy import.

transferability_score.description: [0,1]; <0.5 triggers WARN if case basin differs from geographic_origin

independence_tested.description: Set true only with a documented test report

independence_test_doi.description: DOI of the independence test report; required if independence_tested = true

quality_grade.description: Authoritative grade lives in hsi_evidence table; this is a convenience copy. SPEC §4.2.2.1.
